content: softprops/action-gh-release@v2 is the standard. Set generate_release_notes: true to auto-generate body from merged PRs since last tag - GitHub native feature via .github/release.yml categories config. Alternative: mikepenz/release-changelog-builder-action for conventional commits. For claudebar: generate_release_notes: true is sufficient and zero-config. Manual body override possible via body_path: pointing to a CHANGES.md. The action creates the release and uploads all files in one step.
